heading: This Afternoon
text: Chance of light wintry mix north, mainly in New York.
temperature: Low to mid 30s north, mid 30s to around 40 south

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming windy. Chance of rain showers; some freezing rain possible east.
temperature: Mainly mid 30s to around 40, rising late

heading: Monday
text: Some early freezing rain possible east, otherwise windy with scattered showers.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s west, mid 50s to around 60 east

heading: Tuesday
temperature: Upper 20s to upper 30s, steady or falling
